Assignment #01  
Hope To Skills  
Free Artificial Intelligence Course 
Instructor: Irfan Malik, Dr. Sheraz   
Submission: 
● Add yourself in the Google Classroom using the Code 4kap34u 
● Make Submission in the Assignment-01 portal and press the submit button. 
● Submit a .pdf file detailing all the information. No other format will be accepted 
● Submission file should be named as HTS_Assignment_01.pdf 
● Late submission will be rewarded zero. 
● Deadline for this Assignment is Sunday 04-06-2023 
● Strictly follow the submission deadline.  
 
 
Task 01: Prompt Generation using Chat GPT 
● You have to generate some interesting prompts using chatGPT for Stable Diffusion. 
● The prompts must mention the image main features that you want to create. 
● Generate at least two prompts for each Category. 
 
Here are some categories that you can opt for images  
1. Landscapes 
2. Animals 
3. Abstract Art 
4. Cityscapes 
5. Sci-Fi and Fantasy 
6. Portraits 
7. Still Life 
8. Nature and Botanicals 
9. Architecture 
10. Surrealism

1 
Task 02: Generating the image using Stable Diffusion 
● Use the stable diffusion to generate the images using previously generated prompts 
from chatGPT. 
● There must be 10 different images generated from Stable diffusion. 
● Paste the prompt and the generated image in the Document.  
● The images and prompts will be graded on the basis of their quality. 
● Bad prompt and image quality will result in deduction of marks.
